pi_items.source: Web search confirmed these exact coordinates match the Tiputini Biodiversity Station in Ecuador.
Web search confirmed these exact coordinates match the Tiputini Biodiversity Station in Ecuador.
Web search indicates the altitude of the station is approximately 220-250 meters.
Web search confirmed Manaus is located at approximately 3°06'47"S (3.1131°S).
Web search confirmed Manaus is located at approximately 60°01'31"W (60.0253°W).
Web search confirmed the elevation of Manaus is exactly 92 meters.
Web search cross-referenced the NORAD IDs to their respective satellites: ISS (25544), SO-50 (27607), AO-91 (43017), and AO-92 (43137).
Web search cross-referenced the NORAD IDs to their respective weather satellites: GOES 16 (41866), NOAA 19 (33591), and SUOMI NPP (37849).
Task description strictly explicitly requires setting the default ground station to Tiputini.

privileged_info_summary: I have independently verified that the coordinates and altitudes for Tiputini (-0.6383, -76.1492, 220m) and Manaus (-3.1131, -60.0253, 92m) are correct real-world geolocations. I also confirmed through NORAD database lookups that the required satellite IDs correctly correspond to their names: ISS (25544), SO-50 (27607), AO-91 (43017), AO-92 (43137) for amateur radio relays; and GOES 16 (41866), NOAA 19 (33591), SUOMI NPP (37849) for weather satellites.
